headline: Netflix Ends Warner Deal Talks To Focus On Core Growth Choices
summary: Netflix (NasdaqGS:NFLX) has walked away from a potential acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery. The decision removes the prospect of a large media merger that had drawn significant investor attention. By not pursuing the deal, Netflix preserves balance sheet flexibility and avoids a complex integration of content libraries and operations. Netflix is a global streaming and entertainment company, with a focus on subscription video services and original content. The broader media sector has...

headline: Warner Bros. Discovery Sets Shareholder Meeting Date of April 23, 2026 to Approve Transaction with Paramount Skydance
summary: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. ("WBD" or "Warner Bros. Discovery") (NASDAQ: WBD) today announced that it will hold the Special Meeting of Shareholders (the "Special Meeting") to vote on the merger with Paramount Skydance Corporation ("Paramount") (NASDAQ: PSKY) on April 23, 2026 at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. It also announced that it has commenced mailing of the definitive proxy statement to shareholders in connection with the Special Meeting. WBD shareholders of record as of 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time

headline: MLB faces a historic shift as potential lockout, media rights and other league changes loom
summary: Several changes await MLB after this season, including its CBA's expiration, new media partners, and potential expansion and league realignment.
